rulings.Case Title: THOMAS A MARTINEZ et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, March 6, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Off calendar per moving party.=(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: HERBERT DIXON VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, March 6, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT DAP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion denied, failure to shift burden of proof. Defendant's evidentiary objections overruled. Plaintiff's evidentiary objections sustained except objection twelve. Even if burden shifted, triable issue of fact raised regarding exposure and causation. (Gary and Daryl Dixon's Decarations). =(302/CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: GRAYCOR CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC., AN ILLINOIS VS. MAYTA & JENSEN, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, March 6, 2009, line 6, PLAINTIFF GRAYCOR CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion denied, failure to maintain initial summary judgment burden. CCP section 437c(p)(1). Plaintiff does not present any evidence demonstrating plaintiff's actual damages. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CDF FIREFIGHTERS, A LABOR ORGANIZATION ON BEHALF et al VS. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF PERSONNEL ADMINISTRATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, March 6, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PUBLIC EMPLOYEES RETIREMENT SYSTEM'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff's first Cause of Action fails to state a Cause of Action Under a plain reading of Government Code Section 21363.4. Plaintiff's second Cause of Action fails to state a Cause of Action for equitable estoppel against a government entity. Medina vs. Board of Retirement. 112 C.A. 4th, 864, 870. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: CDF FIREFIGHTERS, A LABOR ORGANIZATION ON BEHALF et al VS. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF PERSONNEL ADMINISTRATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, March 6, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF PERSONNEL ADMINISTRATION DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to amend the complaint to allege new facts that make this complaint timely. Plaintiff's claims are barred by the one year statute of Limintations. Government Code section 19815.8 =(302/CWW/JW)
